notes: Aggregate serving throughput on H100 SXM, transcribed as approximate order-of-magnitude numbers from public vLLM 0.6 benchmark posts and cloud-provider Llama-3 benchmark blogs (e.g. the vLLM perf-update post at https://blog.vllm.ai/2024/09/05/perf-update.html and the Ori / Azure H100 Llama-3 benchmark write-ups). These are not exact measurements; they are illustrative published ranges suitable for exercising the harness's calibration and frontier logic without GPUs. For exact numbers run vllm/benchmarks/benchmark_serving.py yourself and import that JSON.

results.provenance: vLLM 0.6 perf post + community H100 benchmarks (TP=1, fp16, sharegpt-like mix). Approximate.
vLLM TP=4 on 4xH100 SXM (bf16). Approximate published range.
vLLM TP=1 on H100 SXM (bf16). Same architecture as Llama-3-8B; slight TTFT cost from longer RoPE. Approximate.
vLLM TP=4 on 4xH100 SXM (bf16). Approximate published range.
